EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} could not detach a volume from a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} attached a volume to a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not attach a volume to a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} detached a volume from a virtual machine on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not replace a virtual machine root volume on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} replaced a virtual machine root volume on host {event_src.host}
